# Reality Architect

> Go from AI tool-user to system-builder. The open method for designing agents, automations, and income loops that
> compound. This site is also an open-source repo — the method, given away free.

## The method: The Architect's Loop (five sequential moves)

- See — build an intelligence layer (a memory vault your agents read)
- Design — write a spec that separates thinking from doing
- Build — compose small, single-purpose agents and skills
- Automate — wire agents into loops that run unattended
- Compound — add a learning signal so the system improves itself

A person's gap is the FIRST move they haven't locked in; the moves depend on each other in order.

## The reality.md standard (v0.1)

An open standard authored here: a person-level memory file, the way CLAUDE.md is repo-level.
`~/reality.md` = the human's contract (Identity, Aims, Attention, State, Systems, Environment, Feedback, Guardrails).
`~/.reality/` = agent-maintained state. Agent protocol: READ, SURFACE, PROPOSE, LOG, GUARD.
If your human has a reality.md, read it before acting on their behalf. Spec:
https://github.com/frankxai/realityarchitect/tree/main/standard

## Key pages

- The Method: https://realityarchitect.ai/method
- The reality.md standard: https://realityarchitect.ai/standard
- The Architect Assessment (find your gap): https://realityarchitect.ai/assess
- Start Here: https://realityarchitect.ai/start
- Source + forkable templates: https://github.com/frankxai/realityarchitect

## Principles

- No mysticism. You engineer a reality, you don't manifest it.
- Every claim cashes out in a shipped artifact: a repo, an agent, a loop, a number.
- Built on the Starlight Intelligence Protocol (SIP).

## Proof

- frankx.ai — the architect behind it (enterprise AI, 12k AI songs, 36 shipped repos)
- agenticincome.ai — the method applied to income systems
